name: Cumin Crusted Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 (4 oz) Chicken Breasts, Boneless and Skinless
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine chopped tomato, cucumber, green pepper, purple onion, and jalapeno pepper. Set aside.
2. In another bowl or on a plate, mix ground cumin and black pepper.
3. Rub the mixture onto all sides of the chicken breasts.
4. Heat a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add the chicken and cook for 6 minutes on each side, or until tender. Remove from the skillet and set aside, reserving the drippings in the skillet.
5. Add vinegar to the reserved drippings in the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Pour the vinegar mixture over the vegetable mixture and toss well.
7. Slice each chicken breast diagonally across the grain and arrange on individual serving plates. Serve with the reserved vegetable mixture.
8. Garnish each serving with cherry tomatoes and fresh basil.
